extraction.one_line_summary: BAIS Davide won from a 4-man early breakaway at Gran Sasso after the peloton conceded the stage entirely, not even contesting bonus seconds.
tactical_patterns: DSM surrendered maglia rosa defense entirely, allowing 4-man break containing GC threat Petilli unchallenged from kilometer 10.
GC contenders deliberately avoided bonus seconds at finish, signaling Gran Sasso altitude treated as non-selective despite 2000m elevation.

rider_signals.BAIS Davide: positive: second Giro stage win in only third career attempt shows breakthrough conversion rate
rider_signals.TIBERI Antonio: neutral: collected KOM points but lost jersey, suggesting team prioritizing stage hunting over classification jerseys
rider_signals.LEKNESSUND Andreas: positive: fourth consecutive day in rosa extends Norwegian record for most Giro days in pink
